Trader Cheems
Occupation：
Funds managers of Cheems Labs
Family background：
Trader Cheems, born in a family of merchants, was introduced to business realms early on. This early exposure, beyond broadening his perspective, imparted a maturity that distinguished him from other Cheems. His youthful experiences shaped him into a standout figure among his peers.
Charateristics：
Smart enough, calm enough, hard to see through
Prop：
Italian made suits, the treasury
Skill：
Increase team revenue, manage the treasury, has 3 votes
Samurai Cheems
Occupation：
Guardian of Cheems Labs
Family background：
From a tender age, Samurai Cheems had to grapple with the loss of his mother. He turned to his paternal lineage, mastering the unique Cheems martial arts passed down through generations. His adept skills saw him emerge victorious in numerous martial competitions. Yet, his external prowess seemed unable to mend the void within his heart, painting a poignant tale of strength juxtaposed with an inner longing.
Charateristics：
Brave and kind, the symbol of just
Prop：
Samurai sword, straw hat
Skill：
Samurai dash，Samurai slice，has 3 votes
Lord Cheems
Occupation：
Leader of Cheems Labs
Family background：
Lord Cheems' father was the pioneering founder of Cheems World. Lord Cheems was gifted from birth with an extraordinary ability to sense future peculiar occurrences. Cheems World was a place of peace. Nevertheless, things changed when a meteor streaked across the sky, symbolizing the arrival of a dark magic to Cheems World...
Charateristics：
Leadership and Charisma
Prop：
Crown,Staff, Mind Potion
Skill：
Able to sense strange events, foreseen the future, control others’ mind, holds 5 votes
DJ Cheems
Occupation：
Music Producer of Cheems Labs
Family background：
DJ Cheems grown up with great support from his family, telling him to do whatever he likes, he was given with creativity and decisions to be made by himself, he basiclly can do whatever he likes. And as you can see, he grown up as a dope track producer.
Charateristics：
A free soul
Prop：
Headphone
Skill：
Can train fierce creatures with music, has 2 votes
Artist Cheems
Occupation：
The Artist of Cheems Labs (obviously)
Family background：
Artisit Cheems was born in an Art Family, when he was born, his parents drew a strange sign on his forehead. Since then, Artist Cheems had the power to alter real-life scenes through his artworks.
Charateristics：
Creative, heartwarming, yet careless
Prop：
Paintbrush, paints
Skill：
Can alter tragedies with paintings, can also generate new events He has 2 votes.
DEV Cheems
Occupation：
Developer of Cheems Labs
Family background：
Dev Cheems can solve any problems that you can or cannot think of with technology, no one knows what laptop he uses, whether he sleeps, but he’s just always there by his desk, waiting for another command to be sent.
Charateristics：
Well-organized, always get things in control
Prop：
confidential
Skill：
can fix any technical issues，has 2 votes.
“Cheems” is the lord of memes, a small, pitiful, helpless Shiba Inu.

We pay respect to everyone who love Cheems, who has undergone various market dumps, project rugs and collapses in crypto market.

Cheems is here for y’all, whether you have lost your house, risked your health, or got fucked by Doge, come to Cheems and gather a crowd, together, we can generate more wealth.

!Cheems
Cheems ain’t about pump and dump, Cheems is purely here to remind you people who is the Lord of Memes.
$Cheems will give up the permission to control the contract, have no tax income, no team reserves, absolutely no sources of income in anyway, 100% dedicated to the market.
